name: Ukuhlukaniswa Kokopha (Ikilasi I-IV)
description: Ukuhlukaniswa kwegazi kwe-ATLS ngokulahleka kwegazi okulinganiselwe kanye nokusabela komzimba.
instructions: Linganisela ukulahleka kwegazi futhi uqondanise izimpawu zomzimba nekilasi. Ukuphuthuma kokwelashwa kukhuphuka nekilasi.

scoring.treatment: Uketshezi lwe-IV + imikhiqizo yegazi, ukulawula ukopha ngokushesha
Ukulawula ukopha kokuhlinzwa ngokushesha -- okusongela ukuphila

pediatric.note: Izingane zinxephezela isikhathi eside ngaphambi kokudilizwa. Ikilasi III/IV lingase libe ne-BP ecishe ibe evamile kuze kube ukuwa kungazelelwe. Themba i-tachycardia nesimo sengqondo phezu kwe-BP.

obstetric.note: Iziguli ezikhulelwe ziye zanda ngo-40-50% umthamo wegazi. Ingabekezelela ukulahlekelwa okukhulu ngaphambi kokubonisa izimpawu. Ukucindezeleka kwengane kungase kwandulele izimpawu zomama.
